mapper.select: /* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkCompanyList: 관리자 회사 업무 회사 목록 조회 */ SELECT WORK_COMPANY_SEQ , WORK_COMPANY_NM , WORK_PLATFORM_NM , DISP_ORD FROM WORK_COMPANY_INFO ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, WORK_COMPANY_SEQ ASC

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkProjectList: 관리자 회사 업무 프로젝트 목록 조회 */ SELECT WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_SEQ , WORK_COMPANY_SEQ , WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_NM , DISP_ORD FROM WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_INFO WHERE WORK_COMPANY_SEQ = #{workCompanySeq} ORDER BY DISP_ORD ASC, WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_SEQ ASC

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkImportCompanyInfo: 관리자 회사 업무 가져오기 대상 회사 정보 조회 */ SELECT WORK_COMPANY_SEQ , WORK_COMPANY_NM , WORK_PLATFORM_NM , API_URL FROM WORK_COMPANY_INFO WHERE WORK_COMPANY_SEQ = #{workCompanySeq}

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkRow: 관리자 회사 업무 단건 행 정보 조회 */ SELECT J.WORK_SEQ , J.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ , J.WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_SEQ , J.WORK_STAT_CD , J.WORK_KEY , J.TITLE , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_CREATE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS WORK_CREATE_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS WORK_START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS WORK_END_DT , J.WORK_TIME , J.WORK_PRIOR_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('WORK_PRIOR', J.WORK_PRIOR_CD) AS WORK_PRIOR_NM , J.IT_MANAGER , J.CO_MANAGER , DATE_FORMAT(J.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.UDT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UDT_DT FROM WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_JOB J WHERE J.WORK_SEQ = #{workSeq} AND J.DEL_YN = 'N'

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkDetail: 관리자 회사 업무 상세 정보 조회 */ SELECT J.WORK_SEQ , J.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ , J.WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_SEQ , C.WORK_COMPANY_NM , P.WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_NM , J.WORK_STAT_CD , J.WORK_KEY , J.TITLE , J.CONTENT , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_CREATE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS WORK_CREATE_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS WORK_START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS WORK_END_DT , J.WORK_TIME , J.WORK_PRIOR_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('WORK_PRIOR', J.WORK_PRIOR_CD) AS WORK_PRIOR_NM , J.IT_MANAGER , J.CO_MANAGER , DATE_FORMAT(J.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.UDT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UDT_DT FROM WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_JOB J JOIN WORK_COMPANY_INFO C ON C.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ = J.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ JOIN WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_INFO P ON P.WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_SEQ = J.WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_SEQ AND P.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ = J.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ WHERE J.WORK_SEQ = #{workSeq} AND J.DEL_YN = 'N'

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkFileList: 관리자 회사 업무 첨부파일 목록 조회 */ SELECT WORK_JOB_FILE_SEQ , WORK_SEQ , WORK_JOB_FILE_NM , WORK_JOB_FILE_URL , DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT , DATE_FORMAT(UDT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UDT_DT FROM WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_JOB_FILE WHERE WORK_SEQ = #{workSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY WORK_JOB_FILE_SEQ ASC

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkReplyList: 관리자 회사 업무 댓글 목록 조회 */ SELECT REPLY_SEQ , WORK_SEQ , REPLY_COMMENT , REG_NO , DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT , DATE_FORMAT(UDT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UDT_DT FROM WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_JOB_REPLY WHERE WORK_SEQ = #{workSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY REG_DT DESC, REPLY_SEQ DESC

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkReplyFileList: 관리자 회사 업무 댓글 첨부파일 목록 조회 */ SELECT REPLY_FILE_SEQ , REPLY_SEQ , WORK_SEQ , REPLY_FILE_NM , REPLY_FILE_URL , REPLY_FILE_SIZE , DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT , DATE_FORMAT(UDT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UDT_DT FROM WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_JOB_REPLY_FILE WHERE WORK_SEQ = #{workSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY REPLY_SEQ DESC, REPLY_FILE_SEQ ASC

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkReply: 관리자 회사 업무 댓글 단건 조회 */ SELECT REPLY_SEQ , WORK_SEQ , REPLY_COMMENT , REG_NO , DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT , DATE_FORMAT(UDT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UDT_DT FROM WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_JOB_REPLY WHERE REPLY_SEQ = #{replySeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkReplyFileListByReplySeq: 관리자 회사 업무 댓글 첨부파일 목록 조회 */ SELECT REPLY_FILE_SEQ , REPLY_SEQ , WORK_SEQ , REPLY_FILE_NM , REPLY_FILE_URL , REPLY_FILE_SIZE , DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT , DATE_FORMAT(UDT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UDT_DT FROM WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_JOB_REPLY_FILE WHERE REPLY_SEQ = #{replySeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY REPLY_FILE_SEQ ASC

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkReplyFile: 관리자 회사 업무 댓글 첨부파일 단건 조회 */ SELECT REPLY_FILE_SEQ , REPLY_SEQ , WORK_SEQ , REPLY_FILE_NM , REPLY_FILE_URL , REPLY_FILE_SIZE , DATE_FORMAT(REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT , DATE_FORMAT(UDT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UDT_DT FROM WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_JOB_REPLY_FILE WHERE REPLY_FILE_SEQ = #{replyFileSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkStatusList: 관리자 회사 업무 비완료 상태 목록 조회 */ SELECT J.WORK_SEQ , J.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ , J.WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_SEQ , J.WORK_STAT_CD , J.WORK_KEY , J.TITLE , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_CREATE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS WORK_CREATE_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS WORK_START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS WORK_END_DT , J.WORK_TIME , J.WORK_PRIOR_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('WORK_PRIOR', J.WORK_PRIOR_CD) AS WORK_PRIOR_NM , J.IT_MANAGER , J.CO_MANAGER , DATE_FORMAT(J.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.UDT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UDT_DT FROM WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_JOB J JOIN COMMON_CODE WORK_STAT_CODE ON WORK_STAT_CODE.GRP_CD = 'WORK_STAT' AND WORK_STAT_CODE.CD = J.WORK_STAT_CD AND WORK_STAT_CODE.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND J.WORK_STAT_CD != 'WORK_STAT_05' ORDER BY WORK_STAT_CODE.DISP_ORD ASC, J.WORK_CREATE_DT DESC, J.WORK_SEQ DESC

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkCompletedList: 관리자 회사 업무 완료 목록 조회 */ SELECT J.WORK_SEQ , J.WORK_COMPANY_SEQ , J.WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_SEQ , J.WORK_STAT_CD , J.WORK_KEY , J.TITLE , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_CREATE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS WORK_CREATE_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_START_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS WORK_START_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.WORK_END_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') AS WORK_END_DT , J.WORK_TIME , J.WORK_PRIOR_CD , FN_GET_CODE_NM('WORK_PRIOR', J.WORK_PRIOR_CD) AS WORK_PRIOR_NM , J.IT_MANAGER , J.CO_MANAGER , DATE_FORMAT(J.REG_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS REG_DT , DATE_FORMAT(J.UDT_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS UDT_DT FROM WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_JOB J
AND J.WORK_STAT_CD = 'WORK_STAT_05' ORDER BY J.WORK_CREATE_DT DESC, J.WORK_SEQ DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

/* CompanyWorkMapper.getAdminCompanyWorkCompletedCount: 관리자 회사 업무 완료 목록 건수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_JOB J
AND J.WORK_STAT_CD = 'WORK_STAT_05'
mapper.update:
/* CompanyWorkMapper.updateAdminCompanyWorkDetailFields: 관리자 회사 업무 상세 수정 항목 저장 */ UPDATE WORK_COMPANY_PROJECT_JOB SET WORK_CREATE_DT = WORK_CREATE_DT , WORK_STAT_CD = #{workStatCd} , WORK_START_DT =
STR_TO_DATE(#{workStartDt}, '%Y-%m-%d')
NULL
, WORK_END_DT =
STR_TO_DATE(#{workEndDt}, '%Y-%m-%d')
NULL
, WORK_TIME =
#{workTime}
NULL
, UDT_NO = #{udtNo} , UDT_DT = NOW() WHERE WORK_SEQ = #{workSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
